test_cases.test_case: Log in with valid teacher credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
Valid teacher username and password are available
steps: 1. Enter a valid Username in the Username field
2. Enter the corresponding valid Password in the Password field
3. Click the 'Log in' button
test_cases.expected_result: User is authenticated and redirected to the Dashboard where a personalized greeting and dashboard blocks are visible

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with invalid credentials
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter an invalid Username or an invalid Password
2. Click the 'Log in' button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials, the Password field is cleared and the Username value remains for correction

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to log in with empty password and valid username
preconditions: User is on the Login page
steps: 1. Enter a valid Username in the Username field
2. Leave the Password field empty
3. Click 'Log in'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error indicates the Password is required and the form is not submitted

test_cases.test_case: Use the top navigation bar links to go to Dashboard and My Courses
steps: 1. From any page, click the site name 'MoodleTest' on the left and verify it navigates to the home page
2. Click the 'Dashboard' link in the top navigation bar
3. Click the 'My Courses' link in the top navigation bar
test_cases.expected_result: Each click navigates to the correct page: home page, Dashboard, and My Courses respectively

test_cases.test_case: Open notifications and messaging from the top-right icons
steps: 1. Click the notifications bell icon in the top-right
2. Observe alerts area
3. Click the messaging icon in the top-right
4. Observe the messaging drawer opens
test_cases.expected_result: Notifications area toggles and shows alerts or empty state; messaging drawer opens showing recent conversations

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to save an assignment without entering a name
preconditions: A course exists and Edit mode is enabled
Activity Chooser opened and Assignment selected
steps: 1. Open the Assignment creation form via the Activity Chooser
2. Leave the Assignment name field empty
3. Click 'Save and return to course'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error highlights the Assignment name field; the form is not submitted and remains open

test_cases.test_case: Create an assignment with File submissions enabled, allowed types, and a due date
preconditions: A course exists and Edit mode is enabled
Activity Chooser opened and Assignment selected
steps: 1. Enter 'Assignment with files' in the Assignment name field
2. In Submission types check 'File submissions'
3. Set Maximum number of uploaded files to 3 and Maximum submission size to a valid value
4. Add 'pdf,docx' to Accepted file types
5. Enable Due date and select a valid future date/time
6. Click 'Save and return to course'
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is created and appears in the course; its settings show File submissions enabled with the configured file limits and the due date

test_cases.test_case: Create assignment with an extremely long name near maximum length
preconditions: A course exists and Edit mode is enabled
Activity Chooser opened and Assignment selected
steps: 1. Enter an assignment name with 255 characters (or the system's maximum) in the Assignment name field
2. Fill other required fields minimally
3. Click 'Save and return to course'
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is saved and the long name is displayed (truncated visually if UI limits apply) without errors; no data corruption occurs

test_cases.test_case: Set cut-off date to the exact same date and time as the due date
preconditions: A course exists and Edit mode is enabled
Activity Chooser opened and Assignment selected
steps: 1. Enter 'Cutoff equals due' in Assignment name
2. Enable Due date and set it to a specific date/time
3. Enable Cut-off date and set it to the exact same date/time as the Due date
4. Click 'Save and return to course'
test_cases.expected_result: Assignment is saved successfully and appears in the course; both due and cut-off dates are identical in the assignment metadata

test_cases.test_case: Open Activity Chooser and add a Page resource to a section
preconditions: A course exists and Edit mode is enabled
steps: 1. On the Course page with Edit mode enabled, click '+ Add an activity or resource' in a section
2. In the Activity Chooser modal, use the category filter or search to find 'Page'
3. Select the Page tile and click 'Add'
4. Fill the Page name and content minimally and click 'Save and return to course'
test_cases.expected_result: A Page resource is added to the selected section and its name appears in the course content list

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to upload a course image exceeding the Maximum upload size
preconditions: Maximum upload size is set to a smaller value than the file being uploaded
steps: 1. Open Course Settings and locate the Course image upload control
2. Attempt to upload an image file larger than the configured Maximum upload size
3. Click 'Save and display'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error is shown indicating the uploaded file exceeds the maximum allowed size and the course settings are not saved

test_cases.test_case: Enable Dashboard Edit mode, add a block, and reset the page to default
steps: 1. Toggle Edit mode on for the Dashboard
2. Click '+ Add a block' and select 'Text' block from the Add a block page
3. Confirm the block appears on the Dashboard with move and options controls
4. Click 'Reset page to default' and confirm the reset
test_cases.expected_result: The new block appears when added; after reset, the Dashboard layout reverts to its default and the added block is removed

test_cases.test_case: Open Add a block page then click Cancel to return to Dashboard
preconditions: User is on the Dashboard with Edit mode enabled
steps: 1. Click '+ Add a block' to open the Add a block page
2. Without selecting a block, click the 'Cancel' link at the bottom
test_cases.expected_result: The Add a block page closes and the user is returned to the Dashboard without any changes

test_cases.test_case: Star a course from My Courses to pin it to the top
preconditions: My Courses page is accessible and shows multiple course cards
steps: 1. Navigate to My Courses
2. On a course card, click the three-dot menu and select 'Star this course'
3. Observe the course card moves to the top of the grid or is marked as starred
test_cases.expected_result: The course is pinned to the top or visually indicated as starred; status dropdown reflects starred courses when filtered

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to enrol a user without selecting a role in the Enrol users dialog
steps: 1. Click 'Enrol users' to open the enrollment dialog
2. Search and select a user in the user search field
3. Leave the Role dropdown unset or blank
4. Click the 'Enrol users' confirm button
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error prevents enrollment, indicating that a Role must be selected before confirmation

test_cases.test_case: Edit grades inline in the Gradebook Grader report and save changes
preconditions: Course with enrolled students and grade items exists
steps: 1. Enable Edit mode in the Grader report
2. Click a grade cell and enter a valid grade within the activity's range
3. Repeat for another cell
4. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: Edited grade values are saved; the per-cell and overall averages update accordingly and no range violations occur

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to save grades outside the configured grade range
preconditions: Grader report is open with an activity that has a defined max grade
steps: 1. Enable Edit mode in the Grader report
2. Enter a grade value greater than the activity's maximum grade into a grade cell
3. Click 'Save changes'
test_cases.expected_result: The offending cell is flagged with an inline validation error and saving is blocked until the grade is corrected to within range

test_cases.test_case: Use Quick grading to enter inline grades on the Assignment Submissions table and save
preconditions: Assignment with submitted students exists and Submissions view is open
steps: 1. On the Submissions view, enable 'Quick grading' mode
2. Enter numeric grades directly into the Final grade fields for multiple students
3. Click the 'Save changes' button or equivalent
test_cases.expected_result: Inline grades are saved and reflected in the table; Grading summary metrics update to show changes

test_cases.test_case: Enable File submissions and set maximum uploaded files to the minimum allowed (1) and submit one file
steps: 1. Enter an Assignment name
2. Enable File submissions in Submission types
3. Set Maximum number of uploaded files to 1
4. Save the assignment and switch to student view or use a sample student to submit
5. Upload a single file and submit
test_cases.expected_result: The student submission accepts the single file without error; if a second file is attempted it is rejected per the limit

test_cases.test_case: Edit profile with required fields and upload a new profile picture
steps: 1. Navigate to the Profile page and click 'Edit profile'
2. Update required fields: First name, Last name, and Email with valid values
3. Use the User picture upload area to upload a valid image file and provide a Picture description
4. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: Profile is updated successfully; profile page displays new details and picture

test_cases.test_case: Attempt to update profile leaving the required Email field empty
steps: 1. Clear the Email address field while leaving other fields intact
2. Click 'Update profile'
test_cases.expected_result: An inline validation error shows that Email is required and the profile is not updated

test_cases.test_case: Log out terminates session and redirects to login page
steps: 1. Click the user's circular initials icon in the top-right to open the user menu dropdown
2. Click 'Log out' from the user menu
test_cases.expected_result: The session ends and the user is redirected to the Login page; attempting to access protected pages requires re-authentication
